content.body: nicolo-ribaudo: you stamped and then unstamped https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/3896; is there anything left to do there? or did you just want to not merge it at all in preference for https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/2962? I'm fine with that as long as it doesn't take too long
